purpose: Define the machine-readable handbook surface that an agent must read before entering an independently governed service and starting any scan, normalization, diet, planning, or deployment mapping work.
forbidden_actions_before_read: Do not mutate service-local files before handbook acknowledgement.
Do not start cleanup classification before boundary rules are read.
Do not execute shell apply before intake workflow gates are satisfied.
Do not map deployment topology before service identity and runtime profile are read.
decision_gates: handbook_ack_packet must exist before intake packets are valid.
The intake workflow must stay ordered and trace-linked.
Deployment topology mapping must complete before draft plan and gate review.
Agent entry is invalid when governance, orchestration, or prompts surfaces are unreadable.
